data.name: severity.info
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Translator: Blazor adapter severity badge — informational tier.

data.name: severity.warning
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Translator: Blazor adapter severity badge — warning; actionable but non-blocking.

data.name: severity.error
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Translator: Blazor adapter severity badge — error; blocking failure.

data.name: severity.critical
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Translator: Blazor adapter severity badge — critical; system-impacting failure.

data.name: action.save
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Translator: Blazor adapter submit-button label. Imperative.

data.name: action.cancel
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Translator: Blazor adapter dismiss-button label. Imperative.

data.name: action.retry
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Translator: Blazor adapter retry-button label. Imperative.

data.name: state.loading
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Translator: Blazor adapter empty-state placeholder while data loads. Trailing U+2026 ellipsis preserved.
